chapter_title.ar: بَابُ دَعَوَاتٍ مُوجَزَاتٍ لِجَمِيعِ الْحَوَائِجِ لِلدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 60 – Brief supplications for the entirety of the needs of the world and the Hereafter

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/453)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/453)
text: أَتَى جَبْرَئِيلُ ( عليه السلام ) إِلَى النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَقَالَ لَهُ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَقُولُ لَكَ إِذَا أَرَدْتَ أَنْ تَعْبُدَنِي يَوْماً وَ لَيْلَةً حَقَّ عِبَادَتِي فَارْفَعْ يَدَيْكَ إِلَيَّ وَ قُلِ

اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ حَمْداً خَالِداً مَعَ خُلُودِكَ وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ حَمْداً لَا مُنْتَهَى لَهُ دُونَ عِلْمِكَ وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ حَمْداً لَا أَمَدَ لَهُ دُونَ مَشِيئَتِكَ وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ حَمْداً لَا جَزَاءَ لِقَائِلِهِ إِلَّا رِضَاكَ

اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ كُلُّهُ وَ لَكَ الْمَنُّ كُلُّهُ وَ لَكَ الْفَخْرُ كُلُّهُ وَ لَكَ الْبَهَاءُ كُلُّهُ وَ لَكَ النُّورُ كُلُّهُ وَ لَكَ الْعِزَّةُ كُلُّهَا وَ لَكَ الْجَبَرُوتُ كُلُّهَا وَ لَكَ الْعَظَمَةُ كُلُّهَا وَ لَكَ الدُّنْيَا كُلُّهَا وَ لَكَ الْآخِرَةُ كُلُّهَا وَ لَكَ اللَّيْلُ وَ النَّهَارُ كُلُّهُ وَ لَكَ الْخَلْقُ كُلُّهُ وَ بِيَدِكَ الْخَيْرُ كُلُّهُ وَ إِلَيْكَ يَرْجِعُ الْأَمْرُ كُلُّهُ عَلَانِيَتُهُ وَ سِرُّهُ

اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ حَمْداً أَبَداً أَنْتَ حَسَنُ الْبَلَاءِ جَلِيلُ الثَّنَاءِ سَابِغُ النَّعْمَاءِ عَدْلُ الْقَضَاءِ جَزِيلُ الْعَطَاءِ حَسَنُ الْآلَاءِ إِلَهُ مَنْ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَ إِلَهُ مَنْ فِي السَّمَاءِ

اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ فِي السَّبْعِ الشِّدَادِ وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ فِي الْأَرْضِ الْمِهَادِ وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ طَاقَةَ الْعِبَادِ وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ سَعَةَ الْبِلَادِ وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ فِي الْجِبَالِ الْأَوْتَادِ وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ فِي اللَّيْلِ إِذَا يَغْشَى وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ فِي النَّهَارِ إِذَا تَجَلَّى وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ فِي الْآخِرَةِ وَ الْأُولَى وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ فِي الْمَثَانِي وَ الْقُرْآنِ الْعَظِيمِ

وَ سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَ بِحَمْدِهِ وَ الْأَرْضُ جَمِيعاً قَبْضَتُهُ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ وَ السَّمَاوَاتُ مَطْوِيَّاتٌ بِيَمِينِهِ سُبْحَانَهُ وَ تَعَالَى عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَ بِحَمْدِهِ كُلُّ شَيْ‏ءٍ هَالِكٌ إِلَّا وَجْهَهُ سُبْحَانَكَ رَبَّنَا وَ تَعَالَيْتَ وَ تَبَارَكْتَ وَ تَقَدَّسْتَ

خَلَقْتَ كُلَّ شَيْ‏ءٍ بِقُدْرَتِكَ وَ قَهَرْتَ كُلَّ شَيْ‏ءٍ بِعِزَّتِكَ وَ عَلَوْتَ فَوْقَ كُلِّ شَيْ‏ءٍ بِارْتِفَاعِكَ وَ غَلَبْتَ كُلَّ شَيْ‏ءٍ بِقُوَّتِكَ وَ ابْتَدَعْتَ كُلَّ شَيْ‏ءٍ بِحِكْمَتِكَ وَ عِلْمِكَ وَ بَعَثْتَ الرُّسُلَ بِكُتُبِكَ وَ هَدَيْتَ الصَّالِحِينَ بِإِذْنِكَ وَ أَيَّدْتَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ بِنَصْرِكَ وَ قَهَرْتَ الْخَلْقَ بِسُلْطَانِكَ

لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ لَا نَعْبُدُ غَيْرَكَ وَ لَا نَسْأَلُ إِلَّا إِيَّاكَ وَ لَا نَرْغَبُ إِلَّا إِلَيْكَ أَنْتَ مَوْضِعُ شَكْوَانَا وَ مُنْتَهَى رَغْبَتِنَا وَ إِلَهُنَا وَ مَلِيكُنَا .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, raising it,

‘He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Jibraeel<sup>as</sup> came over to the Prophet<sup>as</sup> and said to him<sup>saww</sup>: ‘Your<sup>saww</sup> Lord<sup>azwj</sup> is Saying to you<sup>saww</sup>: “Whenever you<sup>saww</sup> to worship Me<sup>azwj</sup> for a day and night as is the right of My<sup>azwj</sup> worship, so raise your<sup>saww</sup> hands towards Me<sup>azwj</sup> and say: -

‘O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! For You<sup>azwj</sup> is the Praise, eternal Praise along with Your<sup>azwj</sup> Eternality; and for You<sup>azwj</sup> is the Praise, a Praise with no end to it besides Your<sup>azwj</sup> Knowledge; and for You<sup>azwj</sup> is the Praise, a Praise having not extension for it besides Your<sup>azwj</sup> Desire; and for You<sup>azwj</sup> is the Praise, a Praise having no Recompense for its speaker except Your<sup>azwj</sup> Pleasure.

O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! For You<sup>azwj</sup> is the Praise, all of it, and for You<sup>azwj</sup> is the Favour, all of it, and for You<sup>azwj</sup> is the Beauty, all of it, and for You<sup>azwj</sup> is the Light, all of it, and for You<sup>azwj</sup> is the Might, all of it, and for You<sup>azwj</sup> is the Grandeur, all of it, and for You<sup>azwj</sup> is the Magnificence, all of it, and for You<sup>azwj</sup> is the world, all of it, and for You<sup>azwj</sup> is the Hereafter, all of it, and for You<sup>azwj</sup> is the night and the day, all of it, and for You<sup>azwj</sup> is the creation, all of it, and in Your<sup>azwj</sup> Hand is the goodness, all of It, and to You<sup>azwj</sup> do the matters return, all of them, its public and its private.

O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! The Praise is for You<sup>azwj</sup>, an everlasting Praise. You<sup>azwj</sup> are the Good affliction, the One of Majestic Laudation, the concealed Bounty Giver, the Just Judge, the abundant Giver, the Good Rewarder, Lord<sup>azwj</sup> of the one in the earth and Lord<sup>azwj</sup> of the ones in the sky.

O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! For You<sup>azwj</sup> is the Praise in the seven mighty (skies), and for You<sup>azwj</sup> is the Praise in the earth spread out, and for You<sup>azwj</sup> is the Praise of the endurance of the servants, and for You<sup>azwj</sup> is the Praise at the times of the afflictions, and for You<sup>azwj</sup> is the Praise in the mountains (like) pegs, and for You<sup>azwj</sup> is the Praise in the night when it cover, and for You<sup>azwj</sup> is the Praise in the day when it brightens, and for You<sup>azwj</sup> is the Praise in the Hereafter, and the former (life in the earth), and for You<sup>azwj</sup> is the Praise in the doubles (Imams<sup>asws</sup> and the Magnificent Quran.

And Glory be to Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and with His<sup>azwj</sup> Praise, and the earth, all of it would be in His<sup>azwj</sup> Grip on the Day of Judgment, and the skies would be (like) leaflets in His<sup>azwj</sup> Right Hand. Glorious is He<sup>azwj</sup> and Exalted from what they (people) are associating. Glory be to Him<sup>azwj</sup> and with His<sup>azwj</sup> Praise. Everything will perish except for His<sup>azwj</sup> Face. Glory be to You<sup>azwj</sup>, our Lord<sup>azwj</sup>, and You<sup>azwj</sup> are more Exalted, and more Blessed, and Holier.

You<sup>azwj</sup> Created everything by Your<sup>azwj</sup> Power, and Compelled everything by Your<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty, and Exalted above everything by Your<sup>azwj</sup> Loftiness, and Overcame everything by Your<sup>azwj</sup> Strength, and Initiated everything by Your<sup>azwj</sup> Wisdom and Your<sup>azwj</sup> Knowledge, and Sent the Rasools<sup>as</sup> with Your<sup>azwj</sup> Books, and Guided the righteous ones by Your<sup>azwj</sup> Permission, and Aided the Momineen by Your<sup>azwj</sup> Help, and Coerced Your<sup>azwj</sup> creatures by Your<sup>azwj</sup> Authority.

There is no god except You<sup>azwj</sup>, Alone. There is no associate for You<sup>azwj</sup>. Neither do we worship any apart from You<sup>azwj</sup>, nor do we ask except You<sup>azwj</sup>, nor do we turn towards except to You<sup>azwj</sup>. You<sup>azwj</sup> are the place of (placing) our complaints, and the end-point of our hopes, and (You<sup>azwj</sup> are) our God<sup>azwj</sup> and our King’’.
en.sarwar: 16. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid in a marfu’ manner has narrated the following: “Once Jibril (Gabriel) came to the Holy Prophet and said, ‘Your Lord says to you, “When you like to worship Me a day or night a true worshipping, raise your hands to Me and say, ‘O Lord, all praise belongs to You, the eternal praise with Your eternity, all praise belongs to You, a great unending deal of praise except by Your knowledge, all praise belongs to You, beyond the limits of all limits except by Your wish and will, all praise belongs to You, a great deal of praise for whose speaker nothing is enough reward except Your happiness, all praise belongs to You, all praise, all favors, all pride, all beauty, all the light, all the majesty, all the might, all greatness, all the world, all the hereafter, all the night, all the day, all the creatures and all good is in Your hand and to You all matters return, its apparent and hidden. “O Lord, all praise belongs to You, the praise for ever, Your trial is well done. Your tribute is glorious, Your bounties are delightful. Your determination is just, Your gifts are generous. Your rewards are handsome and You are the Lord of those on earth and the Lord of those in the heavens. O Lord, all praise belongs to You, a praise in the mighty seven, all praise belongs to You, in the well-stretched earth, all praise belongs to You, to the capability of the servants, all praise belongs to You, to the fill of the lands, all praise belongs to You in the mountains firmly standing, all praise belongs to You in the night when it becomes dark, all praise belongs to You in the day when it is bright, all praise belongs to You, in the hereafter and in the one before, all praise belongs to You, in the, al-Mathani (name of Chapter One of the Holy Quran) and the great Quran. I testify that Allah is free of all defects, I speak of His praise and all of the earth is in His control. On the Day of Judgment the heavens will be folded by His right hand. I testify that You are pure of all defects, our Lord, the Most High, the Most Blessed, the Most Holy, You have created all things by Your power, subdued all things by Your majesty. You are high above all things by Your highness, You are dominant over all things by Your power, You have invented all things by Your wisdom and knowledge, You have commissioned the messengers with Your books and guided the virtuous people by Your permission, supported the believing people with Your victory. You reign the creatures by Your authority, no one deserves to be worshipped except You alone and You have no partner. We do not worship anyone other than You, we do not ask for help from anyone other than You and we do not incline to anyone other than toward You, You are the One before Whom we complain, the end of our hope, our Lord and our owner.’”
